name: Chocolate Triple Layer Cake with Fluffy Chocolate Frostin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour the cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the dry ingredients: cocoa powder, flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. In another bowl, mix butter, sugar, egg, egg whites, coffee, and vanilla extract until smooth.
5. Gradually add the wet mixture to the dry mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Pour batter into prepared pans and bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow cakes to cool completely before assembling the triple layer cake with frosting.
